name: kopring
description: Claude Code plugin for Gradle + Kotlin Spring Boot projects. 4-step workflow optimized for token usage and resumability across sessions: startPlan → review (subagent) → execute → pr. Once `startPlan` is invoked the chain runs automatically; it pauses only when `review` finds Critical/Major issues or after a section PR is opened (the next section requires PR merge before it can resume). Reviews always run in fresh subagent context; all progress is persisted to a single plan markdown file.
